Letra_cifra:
Intro: 
 
        Bb {4 bars; harmonica enters 3rd bar} 
 
Verse 1: 
 
        Bb 
        Oh, girl 
                   Dm 
        I'd be in trouble if you left me now 
              Eb 
        'Cause I don't know where to look for love 
        Cm                F7sus4 
        I just don't know how 
 
Verse 2: 
 
        Oh, girl 
        How I depend on you 
        To give me love when I need it 
        Right on time you would always be 
 
Bridge: 
 
        Db                        Ab 
        All my friends call me a fool 
                   Bb                        Cm7/F 
        They say, "let the woman take care of you" 
             Db                                   Ab 
        So I    try to be hip and think like the crowd 
        Bb                              Cm7/F 
        But even the crowd can't help me now, oh-oh-oh 
 
Verse 3: 
 
        Oh, girl 
        Tell me, what am I gonna do 
        I know I got a guilty face 
        Girl, I feel so out of place, oh yeah 
 
Harmonica solo over verse chords {2X} 
 
        (1: don't know where to go, who to see, yeah) 
 
Verse 4: 
 
        Oh, girl 
        I guess I better go 
        I can save myself a lot of useless tears 
        Girl I've gotta get away from here 
 
Verse 5: 
 
        Oh, girl 
        Pain will double if you leave me now 
        'Cause I don't know where to look for love 
        And I don't, I don't know how 
 
Harmonica solo over verse chords; fade 5th time 
 
        (2: Oh, girl, why do I love you so... yeah...) 
 
        (3: Better be on my way, I can't stay) 
 
        (4: Have you ever seen such a helpless man)
